Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch.
Barry Schnieder appeared by zoom for and with Lynn Molloy-Duane by zoom.

The court stated that it is happy that the parties came together to do this and noted that no one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Debra J. Dolch is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $481,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-06-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evan Page appeared by zoom for Cheryl Ann Duane.
Barry Schnieder appeared by zoom for and with Lynn Molloy-Duane by zoom.

Mr. Schnieder stated that they agreed to have a neutral fiduciary and that they are in the process of selecting someone. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
